title: Salvage cycle-949's advisor/judge skill-overlay injection (audit-PASS narrative, FAILed only on predicate compile) — add the WithJudgeModel seam tdd encoded
why: Cycle-949 wired policy-resolved skill-overlay injection into the three non-phase advisor/judge dispatch sites (PhaseAdvisor.advisorLaunch, FailureAdvisor.Advise, PlanJudge.GradePlan) so deep/top-tier advisor/judge launches receive the fable overlay that runner.go already injects for phase dispatch. The audit narrative was PASS ('additive, tier-gated, fully verified') but the cycle FAILed because the tdd predicates referenced a core.WithJudgeModel seam the builder never added — the predicate package could not compile, acs-verdict.json was never written, and the missing-file floor FAILed the cycle. The work sits in worktree cycle-21f9f7ae-949, unlanded. OPERATOR PRIORITY 2026-07-20: deep/top phase agents should run opus/pro-class models with the fable skill overlay for planning/audit — this is exactly that wiring.
how_to_apply: Re-derive on a fresh branch off main: (1) port the 3-site overlay injection from the 949 worktree diff; (2) ADD the core.WithJudgeModel functional option the predicates expect (or regenerate predicates against the real seam — prefer adding the seam: it is the documented tdd contract); (3) predicates must compile at build exit (see acs-verdict-always-written item). Verify with the standard suite + tier chains (deep/top => opus per model-catalog pin).
evidence: .evolve/runs/cycle-949/audit-report.md (PASS narrative naming the 3 sites); retrospective-stdout.log (undefined: core.WithJudgeModel); worktree .evolve/worktrees/cycle-21f9f7ae-949 still on disk
notes: [VERIFY 2026-07-23] Advisor site IS live (phase_advisor.go ResolveOverlays). Verify FailureAdvisor.Advise + PlanJudge.GradePlan route through it (PlanJudge unwired per dead-api-sweep; core.WithJudgeModel absent). Close if all three covered.
